concept: Merge & Story by Microfun Limited: This game combines merge puzzle mechanics with a narrative-driven renovation story, where players merge identical items on a board to create higher-level items needed to complete tasks. The core loop involves tapping item generators to produce base items, then dragging and dropping identical items to merge them into more complex ones, which are then consumed to fulfill specific story-related objectives.
name: Gossip Harbor®: Merge & Story
